name: Fruit Shake (Non-dairy!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place almonds in a blender and grind to a fine powder.
2. Add maple syrup and 1 cup of water to the blender. Blend for 1-2 minutes until smooth.
3. With the blender running on high, slowly add the remaining water. Blend for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Pour the almond milk through a strainer into a large bowl lined with cheesecloth (optional but recommended). Strain once more using a very fine strainer if needed.
5. Press the remaining almond fiber to extract all the liquid. The prepared almond milk will keep in the refrigerator for 4-5 days.
6. Discard any leftover almond fiber or use it as a moisturizing body scrub in the shower.
7. Blend the almond milk and fruit ingredients until creamy.
8. Frozen bananas may begin to discolor after about a week, affecting appearance and taste. For best results, use ripe bananas when making shakes.
